title: PixelMOTD
description: Customize your minecraft server motd, change your max and online players, hover, protocol, including Gradient Support
body: --- --- * Support for: **Spigot, Paper, Velocity, Bukkit, Sponge, Waterfall, BungeeCord** * Multi color format support: **Legacy, classic, MineDown, IridiumColorAPI, MiniMessage** * Customizable Max players * Hex Colors Support (1.16+) (Gradient and Normal Hex) * Per Motd Icons! * Per Server & World Whitelist * UUID System & Player Name System for Whitelist * Different Motd for 1.16+ and 1.8-1.15 in the same motd-config. * Center Text System * Countdown System * Customizable Motd Lines * Customizable Protocol Version * MultiMOTD Support * Whitelist Permission Bypass * Customizable Motd Hover * Customizable Commands * Custom Protocol Message * Custom Server-Icon * Performance Boost
